data.title: Stock futures rose after Trump's Greenland threat, breaking key support for S&P 500 and Nasdaq. Nvidia and Tesla dropped.
data.description: Major stock indices including the S&P 500 and Nasdaq experienced a significant drop following President Trump's statements regarding Greenland, with expectations building on his speech at Davos. Tech giants like Nvidia and Tesla saw a decline alongside other megacap companies. Netflix also showed a late drop in its stock value. The Dow Jones Futures show a rise after the sell-off triggered by the President's Greenland threats, with Tesla and Nvidia being among the companies that experienced a decline in their stocks.

Prime Minister's Office:* Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu announced that he accepted the invitation of U.S. President Donald Trump and will join as a member of the Supreme Peace Council composed of world leaders.

data.title: Crypto Council Director at White House warns against operating without market rules, as divisions arise over accepting imperfect legislation now or risking tougher rules later.
data.description: With growing divisions in the cryptocurrency industry, there is a debate on whether to embrace flawed regulations currently or face stricter rules in the future.

data.title: Dell introduces purpose-built education PCs and programs to support schools in transforming education with AI.
data.description: In London, there is a pivotal shift occurring in the field of education with the advent of cutting-edge technologies like Generative AI. Dell Technologies, a longstanding leader in education technology, is spearheading this transformation by providing schools with innovative tools and programs tailored for the AI era. This initiative aims to prepare students and educators for upcoming opportunities. Demonstrating their dedication, Dell has bolstered their education portfolio to support this important shift.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC urges PEN, FONR, GDOT shareholders to reach out over rights discussion. Contact them soon. NY, Jan 21.
data.description: Investors are urged to reach out to the company promptly as time may be running out to protect their interests. A law firm in New York, Halper Sadeh LLC, is currently looking into several companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws. The investigation is focusing on possible violations that could impact shareholders. If you own stock in these firms, it is crucial to take prompt action to safeguard your rights. Stay informed and reach out for support to ensure your interests are protected.

data.title: WISeKey's WISeSat partners with Spacetalk to run neutral platform for global space traffic coordination.
data.description: A collaboration has been formed between WISeKey's subsidiary, WISeSat, and Spacetalk to establish a neutral platform aimed at managing global space traffic. This joint effort will focus on coordinating the movement of satellites in space. The partnership brings together the expertise of WISeSat and Spacetalk to address the increasing challenges posed by space congestion and ensure efficient operations of satellites. This initiative aims to enhance the coordination of space activities and improve overall efficiency in managing the growing number of satellites in orbit. WISeSat and Spacetalk will work together to provide a centralized platform for space traffic coordination, addressing the need for better organization and communication among satellite operators. The collaboration signifies a proactive step towards ensuring the sustainability and safety of space operations amidst the rising number of satellites in orbit.

data.title: WISeKey plans to introduce SEALCOIN, a space-based, quantum-resistant cryptocurrency at Davos in 2026.
data.description: In a recent report, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in five years. This decrease translates to approximately 500,000 individuals finding employment within the last quarter. The report also highlighted a notable increase in job opportunities in the manufacturing and technology sectors, with over 100,000 new positions created. Additionally, the average hourly wage has seen a 3% increase, reaching $25.50. These positive trends indicate a growing and strengthening economy, providing hope for continued improvements in the job market.

data.title: H2SITE launches Norwegian subsidiary in Bergen for maritime hydrogen solutions, aiming to support vessel decarbonisation.
data.description: H2SITE, a Spanish scale-up company headquartered in Bilbao, has announced the launch of its new subsidiary, H2SITE Norway AS, based in Bergen. The purpose of this expansion is to focus on the maritime and offshore industry and facilitate the implementation of hydrogen solutions for vessel decarbonisation. By establishing a presence in Norway, H2SITE aims to work closely with key stakeholders in the industry. The company's technology, primarily developed in Bilbao, will play a crucial role in advancing sustainable practices.
